outlook_paragraph: EOG Resources shows no active drilling sites in the satellite-derived SAR summary as of the decision date, with zero newly or continuously active pads, indicating a pause in near-term drilling activity. Despite this, the deterministic revenue forecast remains at $3.35B, anchored to consensus estimates and supported by a stable WTI environment near $72.90 and a realized price close to benchmark. With only 45% of production attributed to the monitored segment, the lack of observable drilling activity may reflect portfolio-wide operational timing rather than weakness in core areas. Revenue is expected to hold steady based on existing production and favorable pricing, even in the absence of current drilling momentum.
